\tzpentry{ID11413}{S5 Hypervolume Carrier}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
For a 5-sphere of radius R, the hypervolume is pi cubed times R to the fifth.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
V_{S^{5}}=\pi^{3}R^{5}
